name_en: 💖With full original green box packaging💖【New】Gucci Luce series mini shoulder bag. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this elegant mini shoulder bag with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable brown leather shoulder strap adds functionality. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cotton-linen blend lining, Gucci monogram zipper pull, interior: one flat pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (20cm high), twist lock closure, weight: approx. 0.25kg.

Model: 790038.

Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus and card holder
